goals.name: Repo-Home Sync
goals.description: Repo files are deployed to ~/.claude/ correctly

goals.name: Functional Correctness
goals.description: Skills, commands, and rules are structurally valid and their dependencies resolve

goals.name: Principle Alignment
goals.description: Skills, commands, rules, and docs don't drift from the 5 active principles

goals.name: Doc Currency
goals.description: Docs reflect the current state of the system

goals.name: Doc Quality
goals.description: Docs summarize correctly, stay in their lanes, follow writing standards

goals.name: Usefulness & No Overlap
goals.description: Skills, rules, commands serve distinct purposes with no redundancy

goals.name: Proactive Improvement
goals.description: The audit proactively surfaces what could be better

goals.name: Inspection Reporting
goals.description: The audit produces a complete report saved as snapshot

goals.name: Operational Hygiene
goals.description: Home directories stay clean: no debris, no bloat

checks.title: gstack VERSION
checks.why: P1: installed gstack version must match catalog. Mismatch = repo and home out of sync.

checks.title: Skill sync
checks.why: P1+P11: every skill in the catalog must be deployed to ~/.claude/skills/.

checks.title: Bin scripts
checks.why: Skills depend on shell scripts in skills/bin/. Missing = broken invocations.

checks.title: Settings
checks.why: P1: baseline + override must match installed settings.json.

checks.title: Stale artifacts
checks.why: Historical remnants confuse Claude and waste disk.

checks.title: Upstream latest
checks.why: AG7: surfaces upgrade opportunities and new adoptable skills.

checks.title: SKILL.md count
checks.why: Catalog declares what should exist. Missing SKILL.md = broken skill.

checks.title: CLI deps
checks.why: Skills depend on CLI tools (git, gh, jq, codex). Missing = runtime failure.

checks.title: Rules frontmatter
checks.why: AG2: rules need valid paths: globs. AG3: rule with no scope enforces nothing.

checks.title: Commands non-empty
checks.why: Empty command file = broken command.

checks.title: Per-skill table
checks.why: AG4: cheatsheet must accurately reflect the catalog.

checks.title: Hardcoded counts
checks.why: D9: hardcoded counts drift when skills are added/removed.

checks.title: Doc lanes
checks.why: AG3: each doc has one job per lanes table. Content in wrong doc violates single responsibility.

checks.title: Orphan skills
checks.why: AG6: installed skill dirs not in catalog serve no purpose.

checks.title: Stale sessions
checks.why: AG9: session files older than 24h are debris.

checks.title: Temp files
checks.why: AG9: .tmp, .pending-*, .bak files accumulate from interrupted ops.

checks.title: Oversized files
checks.why: AG9: files >10MB may indicate runaway logs or forgotten downloads.

checks.title: Empty dirs
checks.why: AG9: empty directories indicate incomplete cleanup.

checks.title: Historical artifacts
checks.why: AG9: remnants from past repo iterations should not exist.

checks.title: Empty files
checks.why: AG5: a .md file with zero bytes is a quality defect.

checks.title: ~/.claude/ size
checks.why: AG9: tracks disk usage to detect accumulation.

checks.title: ~/.gstack/ size
checks.why: AG9: gstack working dirs grow over time.

checks.title: Analytics volume
checks.why: AG9: JSONL analytics files grow with every skill invocation.

checks.title: Active sessions
checks.why: AG9: many active sessions may indicate leaked processes.

checks.title: Memory files
checks.why: AG9: auto-memory files accumulate across projects.

checks.title: settings.json
checks.why: P1: ~/.claude/settings.json must exist for Claude Code to work.

checks.title: Repo status
checks.why: P11: uncommitted changes mean repo and install may be out of sync.

checks.title: Link targets
checks.why: AG4: broken links mean docs reference deleted content.

checks.title: Layout tree paths
checks.why: AG4: CLAUDE.md layout tree must match actual repo structure.

checks.title: Rule frontmatter paths
checks.why: AG2: rule paths: globs must match at least one file.

checks.title: Principle citations
checks.why: AG3: every rule must trace to a principle or decision.

checks.title: TODOS.md staleness
checks.why: AG7: TODOs older than 30 days with no progress may be abandoned.

checks.title: Still true?
checks.why: AG4: factual claims must match current repo state.

checks.title: Still aligned?
checks.why: AG3: every directive must match the 5 active principles.

checks.title: Still useful?
checks.why: AG5: stale content degrades quality.

checks.title: Right place?
checks.why: AG3: content must be in the correct doc per lanes table.

checks.title: Consistent?
checks.why: AG5: same concept described differently in two docs creates confusion.

checks.title: No overlapping scope?
checks.why: AG6: overlapping scope = wasted maintenance and user confusion.
